title: Objects, Classes, Namespaces, and Binding
description: Model a library circulation domain while tracing real Python object and attribute behavior. Learners cumulatively produce a complete first version of an inspectable library domain model while every earlier competency remains active through theory, guided work, debugging, transfer, retrieval, and assessment.
objectives: Explain class creation, instance creation, namespaces, and method binding.
Distinguish identity, type, value, class state, and instance state.
Use introspection as evidence without coupling production code to implementation details.
